name: Proof Set Nº 01 (6 pcs)
desc: All six denominations, hand-struck from the inaugural session. Wax-sealed in a stamped, felt-lined tin. Each set individually numbered and signed by the presiding Governor.

name: Governor's Edition Tee
desc: Heavyweight 280gsm cotton, screen-printed with the Banco·Bral seal in one-colour ink. Cut for the serious monetary official. Unisex sizing, Loshult Foundry imprint at hem.

name: Mint Apron (canvas)
desc: Waxed canvas, single cross-back strap. Two deep front pockets sized for tongs, pull-tabs, and the current session ledger. Heat and splatter resistant. Not dishwasher safe.

name: Ledger Book, Lined
desc: A5 format, 96 pages, cream stock, sewn binding. Hand-numbered 1 of 60 on the colophon page. Suitable for mint records, reserve calculations, and promissory notes.

name: Coin Capsule, Brass
desc: Airtight brass capsule, museum-grade. Accommodates all denominations up to the Half Keg (50 Bral). Keeps oxidation and beer away from your holdings.

name: Foundry Patch
desc: Embroidered twill, 7cm diameter. Iron-on or stitch-on. Depicts the Banco·Bral seal in silver thread on black ground. Limited run; no reissue planned.

name: Coin Wallet, Full-Grain
desc: Vegetable-tanned leather, saddle-stitched in natural waxed thread. Six coin slots sized to the standard Bral series, one bill sleeve. Banco·Bral seal blind-embossed on the outer flap. Develops a patina with circulation.

name: Zippo, Engraved
desc: Windproof brushed-chrome lighter, lifetime-warranted. Front face deep-engraved with the Banco·Bral seal; reverse stamped with individual unit number. Fuel sold separately. Not for use in the foundry.
